faq.question: Does the college have a football team?
faq.answer_detailed: Yes. The University of Cincinnati has the Cincinnati Bearcats football team, and Nippert Stadium has been the home of the football team since 1901.
faq.source_title: UC in the Big XII | University of Cincinnati

faq.question: Does it offer a Computer Science major?
faq.answer_detailed: Yes. The University of Cincinnati offers a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science.
faq.source_title: Computer Science BSCS | University of Cincinnati

faq.question: What is the in-state tuition?
faq.answer_short: $7,197 per full-time term for Ohio residents at the Uptown/Clifton campus for the 2025-26 cohort.
faq.answer_detailed: For Ohio residents at the Uptown/Clifton campus, UC lists undergraduate tuition for the 2025-26 cohort as $7,197 per full-time term and $14,394 per full-time year.
faq.notes: Tuition varies by campus, residency category, and cohort.

faq.question: Does it provide on-campus housing?
faq.answer_detailed: Yes. UC provides on-campus housing, including traditional rooms, junior suite rooms, suite rooms, and apartment-style rooms.
faq.source_title: Housing - Campus Life | University of Cincinnati
